steps.title: Keep the range unbroken
steps.content: The sentence describes a range: the temperature fluctuated from one value at 11:00 a.m. to another value at 7:00 p.m. No punctuation should separate the preposition from from its object.

steps.title: Remove disruptive punctuation
steps.content: Choice A puts a comma after from. Choice B repeats that error and adds a comma after at. Choice D uses a colon after from and a comma after at. The unpunctuated range reads correctly. The answer is C.
